misc: Appreciates the thoughtful course designs of Kosti Kuronen who passed away in 2024
biography: Ofri, a golfer hailing from the esteemed Golf Pirkkala, brings a unique perspective to the greens. Known for his thoughtful approach to the game, Ofri resides in Tampere, Finland, where he hones his skills and enjoys the tranquility of Finnish nature.

A dedicated student of course architecture, Ofri deeply appreciates the designs of the late Kosti Kuronen, finding inspiration in Kuronen's ingenious layouts and strategic use of the landscape. Ofri is known to often spend hours studying course maps, trying to decipher the secrets hidden within the greens.

With three past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Ofri is determined to make his mark on the competition in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Ofri's unwavering commitment and passion for the sport ensure that he remains a formidable contender.
Always one to watch, it will be interesting to see how Ofri fares in the upcoming tournament.
